notes: Fixtures are illustrative seed data for Codex scaffolding and tests.
They are derived from source-supported contract doctrine, not from live market facts.

article.headline: Hot inflation surprise pushes yields higher as megacap tech weakens
article.body_excerpt: A primary report links the move to higher front-end rate expectations and pressure on semis and AI leaders.

expected.active_window: 8:30 AM ET primary US macro release or 9:30 AM to 11:00 AM ET cash-open confirmation window
expected.notes: Downgrade to no_edge if yields rise without sustained leadership deterioration or if cash-open acceptance contradicts the article mechanism.

articles.headline: Fed speaker opens door to slower pace
Commentators say bonds love the pivot

article.headline: Gold jumps on geopolitical fears
article.body_excerpt: The article is light on new facts and does not resolve whether real yields or dollar behavior support the move.

confirmation_markers: spot gold behavior across the US session
expected.active_window: Any hour if unscheduled geopolitical shock; otherwise confirm through 8:00 AM to 12:00 PM ET overlap or 8:30 AM ET macro window
expected.notes: Downgrade to no_edge if real yields, DXY, and Treasury reaction fail to support the proposed safe-haven mechanism.

article.headline: ECB maintains hawkish tone as US data softens
article.body_excerpt: The report emphasizes relative policy divergence and front-end rate spread implications.

expected.active_window: 8:00 AM to 11:30 AM ET overlap or 8:30 AM ET USD data window depending on catalyst side

articles.headline: Inventories build sharply as refinery runs slow
Oil rallies because traders feel optimistic

required_buckets: post hoc explanation or low-information commentary
